summary: Untracked three specs/tmp/ scratch files (working-tree copies preserved), added a tracked .gitkeep plus specs/tmp/*+!specs/tmp/.gitkeep ignore stanza, fixed two mangled-heredoc artifacts in update.sh (shebang and stray backslash), and cleaned a pre-existing .gitignore mangled-heredoc artifact (bonus phase). Before this agent's own commit could be made, a concurrent parallel task's process (task 92) staged and committed its own work and swept these already-staged task-83 changes into its commit (02f806d), which is mislabeled 'task 92: record confirmed .Trash duplicate-UID evidence + inbox-syncs finding' but actually contains .gitignore, specs/tmp/.gitkeep, the three specs/tmp/ deletions, and update.sh. Content is verified correct and complete in HEAD (nix flake check green, all DoD criteria pass). There is nothing left staged/unstaged to commit for task 83 -- re-running git add/commit would be a no-op. Orchestrator may want to note this attribution issue in task 83's completion record, or optionally amend/split the commit history if strict per-task commit attribution is required, but no functional work remains.
